sorted_actions: WHEN category_l1 = "Professional Services" AND category_l2 = "Software Development Services"
WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Cloud Compute
WHEN category_l1 = IT AND category_l2 = Mobile Workstations
WHEN currency = EUR OR currency = CHF

0.rule_description: Enforces brand-safety review for influencer campaigns in Marketing category

1.rule_description: Cybersecurity advisory suppliers must demonstrate relevant certifications or equivalent references

2.rule_description: Enforces CV review requirement for consulting requests exceeding 60 days in Professional Services > Software Development Services

3.rule_description: Reception and lounge projects require business design sign-off before award

4.rule_description: Ensures that only suppliers supporting data residency requirements are considered for requests with data residency constraints in the IT > Cloud Compute category

5.rule_description: Enforces compatibility review with engineering or CAD lead for mobile workstation requests above 50 units

6.rule_description: Ensure at least three compliant supplier options are compared for IT/Laptops category when budget exceeds EUR/CHF 100000
